rows.concept: Session core-dump (recall) — durable quarantine across the process boundary
rows.what_you_get: A finished session persists as a durable core image (a page table over a content-addressed swap device), reloadable in a fresh process where a sealed page stays sealed — quarantine that survives a restart.
gaps: The durable core-image format/library is consumed by `fak debug`/cdb; it is not itself a one-command surface
Inherits the ~100% evadable + FP-prone detection ceiling (surfaced, not hidden)
rows.durability_note: Every blob is integrity-checked against its digest address on load (a tampered swap device fails closed); a Clear() alone cannot launder poison.

rows.concept: Context debugger (cdb) over a real session transcript
rows.what_you_get: Point it at a real Claude Code transcript and inspect it like a core dump — Info/Backtrace/Examine/WorkingSet/Grep over the pages, driven through the same shipped admission gate.
rows.witness: internal/cdb tests; demand-paged a real 2.8 MB session to a 18 KB page table over a 1.2 MB swap (66x)
gaps: Needs a session transcript to inspect (a real .jsonl path); a pure consumer of recall
Surfaces the gate's decision durably but does not improve the decision (inherits its FP ceiling)
rows.durability_note: Registers nothing with the ABI (a pure consumer); content preserved byte-faithfully; the working set is a small resident slice paged in through the gate.

rows.concept: S7 write-time durability gate (context is not memory)
rows.what_you_get: A cheap lexical classifier tags a benign result turn/session/durable, and a promotion gate keeps only durable-classed facts in the persisted image — an ephemeral observation no longer silently becomes a persistent bias.
gaps: Rung-1 lexical classifier only; rungs 2/3 (bitemporal as-of read, engine TTL) are STUB (#501/#502)
Closes the BENIGN over-promotion arm of memory-poisoning; durable-framed poison still classifies durable (the adversarial arm is the trust gate's job)
rows.durability_note: Rides the additive Meta map so the frozen ABI does not move; the default PromotionWarn posture is non-behavior-changing (stamps + counts, still persists) until an operator opts into Enforce.
